summary: reservations list now no-ops before any live MasterPark verifyLogin/listReservations calls under PRINTING_PRESS_VERIFY, reports neutral listReservations transport failures, locations.php parsing handles escaped apostrophes inside single-quoted JavaScript strings, and reserve submit validation requires vehicle color before saveReservation.
reason: Greptile identified that reservations list was the remaining network-touching command without an IsVerifyEnv guard, that normalizeJSObject emitted invalid JSON for JS-only escaped apostrophes such as \' in single-quoted strings, that listReservations transport errors were mislabeled as auth-session problems, and that the submit preflight did not require the vehicle color used in the saveReservation payload.
validated_outcome: Focused tests cover reservations list under PRINTING_PRESS_VERIFY=1 with zero AJAX calls, neutral listReservations transport-error diagnostics, required vehicle color before submit, and location parsing for single-quoted names containing escaped apostrophes.
